mnemonics: Every Block Contains Hashed Transactions (EBCHT) - helps remember the core components of a blockchain block: data, hash, previous hash, timestamp, nonce
keyPoints: Decentralization eliminates single points of failure and control
Immutability is achieved through cryptographic hashing and consensus
Transparency is maintained through public ledgers and verification
commonMistakes: Confusing blockchain with Bitcoin (one is the technology, the other is an application)
Assuming private blockchains offer the same security guarantees as public ones
Overlooking the importance of consensus mechanisms in maintaining network integrity
